info.title: mynumbers-porting
info.description:
These API methods allow you to manage your porting requests.

Where can I find the BICS Letter of Authorization (LOA) Forms to submit porting requests?
The BICS LOA forms are available in the Number Portability specifications on the MyNumbers Portal. You can request access to the MyNumbers portal by contacting mynumbers@bics.com.

What are the errors that MyNumbers API can return ?

| Code | Description | Http response | | --- | --- | --- | | E001 | The product does not exist in our system. | 400 | | E002 | The country does not exist in our system. | 400 | | E018 | The product is not yet handled via our API. | 400 | | E019 | The routing details are not valid. CRN Parameter must be filled out for the given CRN type. | 400 | | E020 | Please fill out all the mandatory attributes. | 400 | | E021 | The routing details are not valid. At least one CRN Type must be different than NA. | 400 | | E022 | Your price list needs to be defined in our system. Please contact BICS. | 404 | | E030 | The service is temporarily unavailable. Please retry later or contact BICS. | 500 | | E031 | The media type in your header is invalid. Please use application/json. | 400 | | E033 | There is no address with this reference in our system. Please correct the reference. | 400 | | E035 | The length of the attribute {attribute} is too long. The maximum length for this attribute is {size} characters. | 400 | | E039 | Address is not located in the same country as the number. Please fill out the reference of address(es) located in the same country. | 400 | | E041 | There is no file in the request. Please add the file. | 400 | | E042 | The format of the file {documentName} is not valid. Allowed formats are [PDF, TIF, TIFF, JPG, JPEG, PNG, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX]. | 400 | | E043 | The size of the file is too large. The maximum size allowed is 10 MB. | 400 | | E046 | The length of the filename is too large. The maximum length for a filename is 240. | 400 | | E047 | The file name must contain only Latin symbols and 0-9_. | 400 | | E060 | The number specified in request does not exist. | 404 | | E061 | Enum value is specified incorrectly. | 400 | | E080 | List of proof of documents that you have provided does not match the list of proof of documents required. Please upload missing documents. | 400 | | E081 | Request payload is invalid. | 400 | | E085 | The number range not valid. | 400 | | E086 | Invalid value for parameter {attribute}. | 400 | | E087 | Porting Request can not be created for this country. | 400 | | E089 | This number is specified several times in the request. Please specify every number once only. | 400 | | E091 | Cancellation of porting request is not possible. | 400 | | E092 | The format of the number is not valid. | 400 | | E093 | Limit is {amount} numbers per request. | 400 | | E103 | You are not allowed to edit the order. You can only edit order in status Created or Need more information. | 400 | | E119 | A previous task is still pending. Please try again later. | 409 | | E120 | There is no Porting Request with this id in our system. | 404 | | E121 | The 'preferredDate' is a weekend or earlier than current date + 5 business days. | 400 | | E122 | No commercial agreement found. Please contact BICS. | 400 | | E129 | Porting document reference does not belong to address. | 400 | | E130 | Only one document can be used per document type code. | 400 | | E131 | The document can not be used due to its current status. | 400 | | E132 | Porting document is not relevant to porting specification. | 400 | | E133 | Porting document can't be used as it is already linked to another Porting request. | 400 | | E134 | The document is already linked to this porting request. | 400 | | E135 | There is already a document with the given type associated to the porting request. | 400 | | E136 | Parameter documentReference can not be null. | 400 | | E137 | Multiple locations when Porting restrictions are "Address in Region" are not allowed. | 400 | | E138 | End User Address can not be changed as Multiple locations are not allowed when Porting restrictions are "Address in Region". | 400 | | E144 | The number is already in your inventory. | 400 | | E146 | Porting request is not complete. Please add missing document. | 400 | | E147 | Country and Product are not available in your Pricelist. Please contact your AM. | 400 |

get.summary: This method allows you to get your documents allowed for porting request.
get.description: Get all the documents and their status linked to specified Porting Request.

parameters.name: portingRequestId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for a porting request.

schema.description: Unique identifier for a porting request.

400.description: Bad request, An issue occurred while processing the input parameters.

post.summary: This method allows you to add documents to the porting request.
post.description: Update documents in the porting request. This method is used to add documents to the porting request.

parameters.name: portingRequestId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for a porting request.

schema.description: Unique identifier for a porting request.

400.description: Bad request, An issue occurred while processing the input parameters.

204.description: Successful operation. Documents were linked sucessfully.

get.summary: This method allows you to get a list of your porting requests.
get.description: Get porting request details by porting request ID , product, country, bicsReference, customerReference.

parameters.name: portingRequestId
parameters.description: Get a porting by id,  this id is returned when you call the method for creating a porting request.

schema.description: Get a porting by id,  this id is returned when you call the method for creating a porting request.

parameters.name: product
parameters.description: Get portings by product. Valid product codes are IBN, GMN and ITFS. IBN referring to Cloud Number, GMN referring to Global Mobile Number and ITFS referring to International Freephone Number.

schema.description: Get portings by product. Valid product codes are IBN, GMN and ITFS. IBN referring to Cloud Number, GMN referring to Global Mobile Number and ITFS referring to International Freephone Number.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Get portings by country in ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 format.

schema.description: Get portings by country in ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 format.

parameters.name: bicsReference
parameters.description: Get a porting by BICS reference.

schema.description: Get a porting by BICS reference.

400.description: Bad request, An issue occurred while processing the input parameters.

post.summary: This method allows you to create porting request
post.description: Create Porting Request for your numbers via API. The method Create Porting Request will document porting request with all necessary details so our Porting team can process it. </br>You just need to fill out in the request :Product, Country, Estimated Volume, Numbers, End user and Porting Address reference, Document reference. </br>End user address reference and Porting Address reference are response of the API when new address was successfully created. (Create Address method) </br>Document reference are the response from the API when the documents are linked to address. (Add document method) </br>Reference, Preferred date and Additional info are not mandatory fields still they can help customers for better communication with our porting team and add extra info.

400.description: Bad request, An issue occurred while processing the input parameters.

patch.summary: This method allows you to update End User Address and Porting Address in a porting request
patch.description: Update address references in a porting request. Address can be updated only for Porting Request in status "New" or "On Hold, More Information Required".

parameters.name: portingRequestId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for a porting request.

schema.description: Unique identifier for a porting request.

400.description: Bad request, An issue occurred while processing the input parameters.

204.description: Successful operation. Addresses were updated sucessfully.

get.summary:
This API method returns the list of number portability specification per Product, Country.
A portability specification item is the list of portability specification attributes related to the pair Product and Country.
It is possible to filter out the list of portability specifications items by product and/or country.
get.description: This API method returns the list of porting specifications. It is possible to filter out the list of porting specifications items by _Product_ and/or _Country_.

parameters.name: product
parameters.description:
Get specifications by product. Possible values
    - 'IBN' for Cloud Number
    - 'ITFS' for International Freephone Number
    - 'GMN' for Global Mobile Number

schema.description:
Get specifications by product. Possible values
    - 'IBN' for Cloud Number
    - 'ITFS' for International Freephone Number
    - 'GMN' for Global Mobile Number

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Get specifications by country in ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 format.

schema.description: Get specifications by country in ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 format.

400.description: Bad request, An issue occurred while processing the input parameters.

get.summary: This method allows you to get your porting request.
get.description: Get the details of a specific Porting Request.

parameters.name: portingRequestId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for a porting request.

schema.description: Unique identifier for a porting request.

400.description: Bad request, An issue occurred while processing the input parameters.

delete.summary: This method allows you to cancel porting request
delete.description:
This method allows you to cancel a porting request. With the method get list of porting requests, you can retrieve its current status.

Reference table Status > Cancellation of porting request allowed

StatusCancellation allowed
NewYes
Under verificationYes
On hold, more information requiredYes
Submitted to operatorYes if option 'confirmCancel' is specified in the request
AcceptedNo
Partially AcceptedNo
RefusedNo
CompletedNo

parameters.name: portingRequestId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for a porting request.

schema.description: Unique identifier for a porting request.

parameters.name: confirmCancel
parameters.description: Use this option to cancel the porting request when it is already in status 'Submitted to operator'. You agree that by cancelling the port request at this stage of the process you may be charged for the port request unless some special conditions apply in the respective country.

schema.description: Use this option to cancel the porting request when it is already in status 'Submitted to operator'. You agree that by cancelling the port request at this stage of the process you may be charged for the port request unless some special conditions apply in the respective country.

400.description: Bad request, An issue occurred while processing the input parameters.

portingRequestId.description: our internal reference identifying your request

routing.description: The routing configuration you want to apply for this number.

numberTo.description: last number of the range or null when porting a single number

addressDocumentStatus.description:
Validation status:
  • "Uploaded": The file is in process of being uploaded, checked by our virus scanners and attached to your address.
  • "Rejected": The file is rejected by our virus scanner. It may contain a virus or a malicious script.
  • "Submitted": We received your document.
  • "Under Validation": Your document is under validation.
  • "Validated": Your document has been validated.
  • "Declined": Your document has been declined, please upload a new document.
  • "Expired": Your document has been expired, please upload a new document.

created.description: Created date of the porting request document.

comment.description: Reason why your document was Rejected or Declined.
comment.example: Not readable. Please provide new document

code.description: Error code, the complete description can be found in API documentation

description.description: Description of the error, the complete description can be found in API documentation
description.example: Description of the error that occurred.

timestamp.description: timestamp of error in UTC format

areaCode.description: Area code of the number according to the national numbering plan.

location.description: Location indicates in most cases the city that is attached to the number according to the national numbering plan. Sometimes, it is used to indicate whether it is a national or a mobile number.

accessType.description:
Access type of the calling party. You can apply a different routing per access type. The possible values are
  • fix: Fix line
  • mob: Mobile line
  • pay: Payphone line
  • fixMob: Fix and Mobile lines
  • fixPay: Fix and Payphone lines
  • mobPay: Mobile and Payphone lines
  • fixMobPay: Fix, Mobile and Payphone lines

PortabilityType.description:
Number portability: Change of Telecom Provider at National level.</br>
Change of Agency: It is a re-allocation of number by the existing Telecom Provider to another customer

proofOfDocuments.description:
true: proof of documents is mandatory</br>
false: proof of documents is optional</br>
null: Not applicable for this address requirement type</br>

documentTypesForIndividual.description: List of required documents for individual.

documentTypesForCompany.description: List of required documents for company.

pop.description: Point of Presence (PoP) refers to your access point to which the traffic is routed.

accessNetwork.description: The network of the calling party. Routing detail can differ per access network of the calling party.

crnValue.description: The value to be used by the translation rule of the crnType. Only applicable to crnTypes prefix, suffix and freetext.

customerRouting.description: This parameter allows you to specify routing information for the numbers you port. You can differentiate calls based on access type/access network by defining a different customer routing number per access type/access network. For more info about the combination access type/access network, please consult the method Get Pricelist. If you want to define the same routing configuration for every combination access type/access network, you can omit the routing attributes Access Type and Access Network, and only specify crnType and crnValue.

country.description: Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 format.

product.description: Valid product codes are ‘IBN’, 'ITFS’, 'GMN’. IBN referring to Cloud Number, ITFS referring to International Freephone Number and GMN referring to Global Mobile Number.

maxLeadTime.description: Maximum time to complete (in days) the porting request.

id.description: Identifier of the porting specification item

lastModified.description: Modified date of the porting specification.

minLeadTime.description: Minimum time to complete (in days) the porting request.

country.description: Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 format for which numbers will be ported.

product.description:
Valid product codes. Possible values
  • "IBN" for Cloud Number
  • "ITFS" for International Freephone Number
  • "GMN" for Global Mobile Number

additionalInfo.description: Customer Additional Info for the Porting Case.

estimatedVolume.description: Estimated Volume in minutes per month.

preferredDate.description: Indicative date that is Customer Preffered Date for the porting and it is current date + 5 days and not weekends.

email.description: address(es) of porting responsible(s),  multiple addresses are separated by semi-colon ';'.   This value is included in all communications regarding this request.

reference.description: Reference of the End User Address.

country.description: Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 format for which numbers will be ported.

product.description:
Valid product codes. Possible values
  • "IBN" for Cloud Number
  • "ITFS" for International Freephone Number
  • "GMN" for Global Mobile Number

created.description: Created date of the porting request.

estimatedVolume.description:
Estimated Volume in minutes per month. Possible values are
  • "< 1000" – less than 1000 minutes per month
  • "1000 – 10.000" – between 1000 and 10.000 minutes per month
  • "10.000 – 100.000" - between 10.000 and 100.000 minutes per month
  • "> 100.000" – more than 100.000 minutes per month

additionalInfo.description: Customer Additional Info for the Porting Case.

comment.description: Additional information on the status of the Porting Request. It helps you to understand what you need to provide to fulfil your porting request.

portingRequestId.description: Id received when creating a porting request.

lastModified.description: Modified date of the porting request.

preferredDate.description: Indicative date that is Customer Preffered Date for the porting and it is current date + 5 days and not weekends.

status.description: Status of this request. Possible values are

reference.description: Reference of the End User Address.

crnType.description:
The translation rule for the customer routing number that you want to apply to the number.
  • `prefix` - To prefix the access number with the specified crnValue.
  • `suffix` - To suffix the access number with the specified crnValue.
  • `freetext` - To define your own customer routing number.
  • `copy` - To use the access number as your customer routing number.
  • `NA` - To bar incoming calls for this routing.
